title: Dry Bulk Fleet Growth Remains Moderate
section_path: Dry Bulk Fleet Growth Remains Moderate
section_path_text: Dry Bulk Fleet Growth Remains Moderate
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
Approximately 46 dry bulk newbuildings were delivered in March, which is 21 more than were delivered in February. March saw the delivery of 19 handysize vessels, 16 handymax vessels, 7 panamax vessels, and 4 capesize vessels. In comparison, February saw the delivery of 10 handysize vessels, 9 handymax vessels, 2 panamax vessels, and 4 capesize vessels.
